THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARGETTS, NOAH LEE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JULIE WHIM AGENCY THIS CLAIM ARISES OUT OF THE SAME ALLEGATIONS PLAINTIFF BROUGHT IN CSM-18-858515 AND IS BARRED BY RES JUDICATA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
